# @verevoir/assets

> Binary asset management. BlobStore interface for file storage, AssetManager for metadata + blobs. Depends on `@verevoir/storage`.

## Install

```bash
npm install @verevoir/assets
```

Runtime dependency: `sharp` (image metadata extraction). Peer dependency: `@verevoir/storage`.

## Core Components

### AssetManager

Manages assets (upload, download, list, update metadata, delete). Stores binary data in a BlobStore and metadata in a StorageAdapter.

```typescript
import { AssetManager, MemoryBlobStore } from '@verevoir/assets';
import { MemoryAdapter } from '@verevoir/storage';

const db = new MemoryAdapter();
const blobs = new MemoryBlobStore();
await db.connect();

const manager = new AssetManager({
  storage: db,
  blobStore: blobs,
  // analyzer: optional AssetAnalyzer for auto-tagging
});
```

### Upload

```typescript
const asset = await manager.upload({
  data: uint8Array, // Uint8Array binary data
  contentType: 'image/jpeg',
  filename: 'photo.jpg',
  createdBy: 'user-123',
});
// Returns Asset with id, type, format, width, height, etc.
```

### Other Operations

```typescript
const asset = await manager.get(id);
const { data, contentType } = await manager.download(id);
const assets = await manager.list({ where: { type: 'image' } });
await manager.updateMetadata(id, { alt: 'A photo', tags: ['hero'], hotspot: { x: 0.5, y: 0.3 } });
await manager.delete(id);
```

### Asset Type

```typescript
interface Asset {
  id: string;
  contentType: string;
  filename: string;
  size: number;
  type: 'image' | 'video';
  format: 'bitmap' | 'vector';
  width: number | null;   // null for SVG and video
  height: number | null;
  hotspot: Hotspot | null; // { x: number; y: number } — 0-1 range
  alt: string | null;
  tags: string[];
  attribution: string | null;
  createdBy: string;
}
```

Blob is immutable after upload. Metadata is mutable via `updateMetadata()`.

## BlobStore Interface

```typescript
interface BlobStore {
  put(key: string, data: Uint8Array, contentType: string): Promise<void>;
  get(key: string): Promise<BlobData | null>;
  delete(key: string): Promise<void>;
}
```

### Implementations

- `MemoryBlobStore` — in-memory (Map-based, defensive copies)

### Subpath Exports

- `@verevoir/assets/s3` — `S3BlobStore` wrapping `@aws-sdk/client-s3` (optional peer dep)
- `@verevoir/assets/gcs` — `GcsBlobStore` wrapping `@google-cloud/storage` (optional peer dep)

```typescript
import { S3BlobStore } from '@verevoir/assets/s3';
import { GcsBlobStore } from '@verevoir/assets/gcs';

const s3 = new S3BlobStore({ client: s3Client, bucket: 'my-bucket', prefix: 'assets/' });
const gcs = new GcsBlobStore({ client: storageClient, bucket: 'my-bucket', prefix: 'assets/' });
```

Cloud adapters accept a pre-configured client (dependency injection).

## AssetAnalyzer

Optional interface for auto-populating alt text and tags on upload.

```typescript
interface AssetAnalyzer {
  analyze(input: { data: Uint8Array; contentType: string; filename: string; existingTags: string[] }): Promise<{ alt: string; tags: string[] }>;
}

const manager = new AssetManager({ storage: db, blobStore: blobs, analyzer: myAnalyzer });
// On upload, analyzer runs automatically (non-fatal on failure)
```
